title: Write SQL statements for the following. [3×5=15 Marks]

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Write SQL statements for the following. [3×5=15 Marks] 
Patient (patientNo, patName, patAddr, DOB)
Ward (wardNo, wardName, wardType, noOfBeds)
Contains (patientNo, wardNo, admissionDate)
Drug (drugNo, drugName, costPerUnit)
Prescribed (patientNo, drugNo, unitsPerDay, startDate, finishDate)

  (1) What is the total cost of Morphine supplied to a patient called ‘John Smith’ ?


(2) For each ward that admitted more than 10 patients today, list the ward number, ward type and number of beds in each ward.


(3) List the numbers and names of all patients and the drugNo and number of units of their medication. The list should also include the details of patients that are not prescribed medication.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
(1) 

SELECT SUM(Drug.costPerUnit * Prescribed.unitsPerDay * DATEDIFF(day, Prescribed.startDate, Prescribed.finishDate)) AS TotalCost
FROM Patient
INNER JOIN Prescribed ON Patient.patientNo = Prescribed.patientNo
INNER JOIN Drug ON Prescribed.drugNo = Drug.drugNo
WHERE Patient.patName = 'John Smith' AND Drug.drugName = 'Morphine'

(2) 

SELECT Ward.wardNo, Ward.wardType, Ward.noOfBeds, COUNT(Contains.patientNo) AS NumPatientsAdmitted
FROM Ward
INNER JOIN Contains ON Ward.wardNo = Contains.wardNo
WHERE Contains.admissionDate = CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY Ward.wardNo, Ward.wardType, Ward.noOfBeds
HAVING COUNT(Contains.patientNo) > 10

(3) 

SELECT Patient.patientNo, Patient.patName, ISNULL(Prescribed.drugNo, 'N/A') AS drugNo, ISNULL(Prescribed.unitsPerDay, 'N/A') AS unitsPerDay
FROM Patient
LEFT JOIN Prescribed ON Patient.patientNo = Prescribed.patientNo
ORDER BY Patient.patientNo, Prescribed.drugNo

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: 解释第二问为啥GROUP BY后面有3个参数，中文

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: 第二问中，使用了GROUP BY语句对Ward关系中的wardNo、wardType和noOfBeds三个字段进行分组。这三个字段都被包含在SELECT语句中，因此需要进行分组以在每个组中显示这些字段的值。同时，查询中使用了聚合函数COUNT()对在每个分组中存在的Contians关系中的patientNo数量进行计数。因此，为了得到每个Ward的相关信息以及该Ward今天接受治疗的患者数量，需要对这三个字段进行分组。
